name: MeetMindAI
description: TypeScript-powered AI meeting assistant that processes transcripts, extracts actionable items, and generates structured meeting summaries.
readme:
# MeetMindAI

MeetMindAI is an AI-powered meeting assistant designed to tackle the problem of capturing action items and key insights from long, unstructured meetings.

### Tech Stack
- TypeScript, Node.js, React, OpenAI API

### Key Features
- Direct transcription processing
- Automated actionable item extraction
- Multi-turn summaries and meeting minutes generation

name: ai-decision-matrix
description: Interactive evaluation dashboard and decision framework providing real-time recommendations for enterprise LLM selection based on cost, latency, and privacy tradeoffs.
readme:
# AI Decision Matrix

Selecting the right AI model for enterprise systems requires navigating complex cost, latency, and privacy tradeoffs. This project provides an interactive dashboard to evaluate and select LLMs.

### Tech Stack
- HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS

name: cloud-kitchen-market-intelligence-nashik
description: Market intelligence system analyzing competitor density, customer demand zones, and optimizing regional pricing models for cloud kitchens in Nashik.
readme:
# Cloud Kitchen Market Intelligence Nashik

Developed a market intelligence system using Python to analyze competitor density, customer demand zones, and optimize regional pricing models in Nashik to reduce restaurant failure rates.

### Tech Stack
- Python, Pandas, Numpy, Data Analysis

name: pictoai
description: High-quality image generation from natural language descriptions using Hugging Face Transformers Stable Diffusion with real-time API integration.
readme:
# PictoAI

PictoAI is a robust text-to-image generator using Hugging Face Transformers and Stable Diffusion. It includes a Flask API backend and MongoDB caching to store image metadata.

### Why ChromaDB or Vector DB was selected for research extension?
ChromaDB was selected for a semantic image indexing extension, permitting users to run image-to-image queries based on visual descriptions embedded in vector spaces.

### Tech Stack
- Python, Flask, MongoDB, Stable Diffusion

commits.message: Integrate Stable Diffusion pipeline with Hugging Face
commits.author: Piyush Bhardwaj

commits.message: Add Flask REST endpoints for image generation requests
commits.author: Piyush Bhardwaj

commits.message: Configure MongoDB to cache generated image metadata and prompts
commits.author: Piyush Bhardwaj

commits.message: Fix VRAM memory leak during concurrent generation tasks
commits.author: Piyush Bhardwaj

name: order-api
description: Highly available REST API handling high-volume e-commerce order creation with efficient validation, transaction consistency, and race condition prevention.
readme:

This API addresses transaction consistency and race conditions during high-volume checkouts on e-commerce platforms.

name: AetherGuard-Forensics
description: Deep learning forensics engine capable of detecting synthetic media anomalies (deepfakes) with high accuracy, implementing neural anomaly verification.
readme:
# AetherGuard Forensics

AetherGuard is a deepfake detection system designed to counter threats to media authenticity. It uses PyTorch models to spot synthetic face changes in videos.

### Research Publication
- Published in IJAMRED Journal, May 2026. DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20108986

### Tech Stack
- Python, FastAPI, PyTorch, OpenCV, Deep Learning

commits.message: Setup PyTorch models and network weights loader
commits.author: Piyush Bhardwaj

commits.message: Implement neural anomaly detector for video faces
commits.author: Piyush Bhardwaj

commits.message: Build FastAPI inference endpoint for video uploads
commits.author: Piyush Bhardwaj

commits.message: Validate models with test dataset, achieve 94.8% detection accuracy
commits.author: Piyush Bhardwaj

name: SplitEase
description: Expense-sharing platform that dynamically computes ledger balances on-the-fly to prevent sync anomalies.
readme:
# SplitEase

SplitEase is a modern bill-splitting application that computes ledger balances on-the-fly. This prevents database synchronization anomalies common in peer-to-peer expense logs.

### Tech Stack
- Next.js 16, React, TypeScript, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Tailwind CSS

commits.author: Piyush Bhardwaj

name: KnowledgeFlow-Ai
description: Semantic-search task board leveraging FAISS and SentenceTransformers locally to index and search workspace documentation by meaning rather than exact keywords.
readme:
# KnowledgeFlow AI

KnowledgeFlow AI replaces exact keyword task searches with local semantic search. It embeds workspace cards using SentenceTransformers and queries them using a FAISS index.

### Tech Stack
- FastAPI, React, MySQL, SentenceTransformers, FAISS, Python

commits.message: Create FastAPI database sync routes and MySQL handlers
commits.author: Piyush Bhardwaj

commits.message: Build React task board UI with semantic search query bar
commits.author: Piyush Bhardwaj

name: breatheesg-emissions-platform
description: Django-based enterprise emissions platform parsing mixed-language CSV utility logs, calculating carbon footprints via Haversine distance, and managing compliance audits.
readme:
# BreatheESG Emissions Platform

BreatheESG provides auditing tools to calculate corporate emissions footprints. It parses utility files and computes transportation logs based on Haversine distance metrics.

### Tech Stack
- Django REST, React, PostgreSQL, Python, Vanilla CSS
